items.title: Canada mass shooting suspect had police visits over mental health struggles
items.dek: Police say the suspect's firearms licence expired two years ago, and exactly who owned the guns used in the attack is unclear.
items.body: Police say the suspect's firearms licence expired two years ago, and exactly who owned the guns used in the attack is unclear.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Norway's former PM charged with gross corruption over Epstein links
items.dek: The charge was brought after the Council of Europe lifted his immunity, which he had as its former secretary general.
items.body: The charge was brought after the Council of Europe lifted his immunity, which he had as its former secretary general.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: What do we know about Kim Jong Un's daughter - and expected successor?
items.dek: Kim Jong Un has chosen Miss Kim as his heir, South Korea's spy agency says - but what exactly do we know about her?
